shorts.title: 5 Navy Planes Vanished Together — Flight 19, 1945 #shorts
shorts.hook_question: 5 PLANES VANISHED. IN CLEAR WEATHER. TOGETHER.
shorts.desc:
December 5, 1945. Five Navy Avenger bombers vanish over the Atlantic in perfect weather. A rescue plane sent after them disappears too. Six aircraft, 27 men, and not one piece of wreckage was ever found.

#shorts #history #mystery #flight19 #bermudatriangle #voidline

shorts.title: One Ship. Everyone On Board Dead. Smiling. — SS Ourang Medan, 1947
shorts.hook_question: ONE SHIP. EVERYONE ON BOARD DEAD. SMILING.
shorts.desc:
June 1947, the Strait of Malacca: a Dutch freighter radios that every officer is dead, then sends one final transmission — "I die." Rescuers find the whole crew dead with no wounds and no fire. Before a tow line can go on, the ship reportedly explodes and sinks. No shipping registry has ever listed a vessel named Ourang Medan. No wreck, no crew list, no original radio log has ever surfaced — only retellings.

#shorts #history #mystery #ourangmedan #ghostship #voidline
shorts.voice: David Documentary (ppLqTilh7rH7fbUVlXsf), eleven_multilingual_v2, direct API (same cross-host MCP filesystem isolation as w27_discovery_flight19 — see LEARNINGS.md)

shorts.title: Kept in the Dark for 16 Years — Kaspar Hauser, 1828 #shorts
shorts.hook_question: KEPT IN THE DARK 16 YEARS. THEN HE APPEARED.
shorts.desc:
May 1828, Nuremberg: a teenage boy stumbles into the town square, barely able to stand, able to write only one thing — his name. He claims a lifetime alone in a darkened cell. Rumors spread he's the missing heir to the House of Baden. Five years later he's found stabbed in a public park, and who he really was has never been confirmed.

#shorts #history #mystery #kasparhauser #voidline

shorts.title: 3 Kids Walked to the Beach. None Came Back. — The Beaumont Children, 1966 #shorts
shorts.hook_question: 3 KIDS WALKED TO THE BEACH. NONE CAME BACK.
shorts.desc:
January 26, 1966 — Australia Day. Nine-year-old Jane Beaumont takes her younger siblings Arnna, 7, and Grant, 4, on the tram to Glenelg Beach near Adelaide — the first time their mother lets them go alone. They never come home. Witnesses report a tall, fair-haired stranger playing with them; a shopkeeper says Jane paid with money she shouldn't have had. One of Australia's largest manhunts follows. Nearly 60 years later, none of the three has ever been found.

#shorts #history #mystery #beaumontchildren #truecrime #voidline
shorts.voice: SILENT — ElevenLabs Creator quota at 892/121849 chars remaining this billing period (resets 2026-07-30, see LEARNINGS.md BLOCKER_2026-07-11-ELEVENLABS-QUOTA opened by the LONG-2 production session). The 593-char VO for this Short would technically fit, but spending nearly the entire remaining shared-account balance on a Short that couldn't be uploaded today anyway (cookie also dead) wasn't worth it — conserved for LONG-1/LONG-2 recovery once quota resets. Captions carry the full story; script.json keeps the VO text ready for a silent-to-voiced re-render later.

shorts.title: Someone Hijacked Live TV for 90 Seconds — Max Headroom, 1987 #shorts
shorts.hook_question: SOMEONE HIJACKED LIVE TV FOR 90 SECONDS. THEN VANISHED.
shorts.desc:
November 22, 1987, Chicago: during the WGN-TV evening news, the picture cuts to static and a masked figure in a Max Headroom costume flickers onto the screen. Two hours later it happens again on WTTW, mid-episode of Doctor Who — the intruder rambles, gets spanked with a flyswatter, then vanishes. Broadcast intrusion is a federal felony; the FBI investigates for years. No one has ever been identified or charged.

#shorts #history #mystery #maxheadroom #unsolved #voidline
shorts.voice: SILENT — ElevenLabs Creator quota reconfirmed at 892/121849 chars remaining this billing period (resets 2026-07-30, see LEARNINGS.md BLOCKER_2026-07-11-ELEVENLABS-QUOTA). Captions carry the full story; script.json keeps the VO text ready for a real voice re-render once quota resets.
